title: NetherEx
description: NetherEx is a nether content mod.
body:
![Nether header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Nether_Expansion/BH_NEX_header.webp)
![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Nether_Expansion/BH_NEX_overview_green.webp)
NetherEx is a mod designed to expand on and enhance the feel of the Nether. It adds new biomes that are filled with new blocks, items, and mobs. It also adds new content to the already exisiting Nether biomes.

![Links](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Nether_Expansion/BH_NEX_links_orange.webp)
If you have any questions or would like to discuss the mod, feel free to join the mod discord server [here](https://discord.gg/gxvRzEY).

If you would like to support me, please visit my Ko-fi page [here](https://ko-fi.com/logictechcorp).

![Need a server?](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Nether_Expansion/BH_NEX_server_green.webp)
Click the banner below to get a server with BisectHosting! Use code 'Logic' to support me and get 25% off your first month. Don't see a banner? Then click this link: [https://bisecthosting.com/logic](https://bisecthosting.com/logic)

[![BisectHosting promo](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Nether_Expansion/BH_NEX_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/logic)

![Credits](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Nether_Expansion/BH_NEX_credits_orange.webp)
